case_title: EUGENE H AUSTIN VS. GARY EVANS

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 08/19/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "UNCLAIMED - RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $930.00 FILED BY AUSTIN, EUGENE H AS TO DEFENDANT EVANS, GARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF EUGENE H. AUSTIN. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT GARY EVANS. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED.(506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUSTIN, EUGENE H ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER RE: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
